response.justification: Despite extensive experience, Bogdan is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level scope; his title history and deep expertise in DLang, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure suggest he would find this role underwhelming or misfit for his career trajectory, and his basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple roles
Proven full-stack development with REST APIs and relational databases
Active open-source contributions and clear passion for clean architecture
concerns: Overqualified with senior/staff titles, risking misalignment with junior role expectations
Primary technical stack includes DLang and non-standard tools, not aligned with Nest.js or PostgreSQL focus
Basic German language skills may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
